scenario.purpose: Identify whether the target still has a learnable gap from the stronger/reference run, and what structural strategy is worth learning.
scenario.focusBrief: 当两个版本在核心结论、风险点和动作建议上等价时，应更倾向于 flat，而不是把风格差异误判成信息不足。

不要添加解释。
